e_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7493938172787690521","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+养成+无后宫+不无脑+各领域发展】
技能等级：入门级-精通级-专业级-大师级-神话级
“作为世界马拉松大满贯选手，并且每次都是以第一名成绩冲线，陈浮他正一次又一次的突破着世界马拉松的极限....”
...
“这一天，魔都Major的决赛舞台的赛场上'乌云'密布，遮住了日月星辰！
作为几乎以一己之力带领cncs队伍捧起家Major奖杯的云神，你有什么想说的话吗？”
...
“身为路人歌手，让你来一轮游的，怎么成踢馆了？还吊打一众专业歌手”
“让你来客串个角色，你这演技怎么比影帝还逼真？”
....
大学新生陈浮,意外觉醒“全能选手情绪系统”，从此开启了全能之路。
渐渐的随着跑步，游戏，唱歌，表演...等一系列领域的升级。
陈浮逐渐在各个领域崭露头角，人们发现越来越不对劲了，怎么他什么都会啊！而且还越来越强!
【众多选手得知你参加比赛，压力倍增，情绪值+9999999！】
...
有记者向各项荣誉加身的陈浮提问：
“请问还有什么是您不会的吗？”
“没有，因为我是全能选手啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b23ec254ba39f3402e541151b799e21f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜无迹","author_id":"","book_id":"7493938172787690521","book_name":"跑完马拉松还打电竞，你认真的？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#505050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4975人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7539389162303013401","read_count":"4975","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"443336"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"203","tags":"都市日常,都市,都市异能,体育,系统,全能,电竞,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/1758ffb70c4d13ad4f2ed5c848bca9fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434865&x-signature=E%2ByLgaNZ%2F1NwwGJW7gjHMJYFTtI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3532107248312615","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_
